_comment_: Phase 4t W2 composite backtest config — Russell 2000 / monthly. SAME window as the sp500 run (2018-01-31 -> 2024-12-31) for direct large-cap vs small-cap comparability. Monthly cadence keeps the run tractable: ~2000 tickers x 84 rebalances at sp500 weekly would be ~6x the load. The Phase 4u cursor fix makes the russell2k cursor doc safe regardless of run length; the long wall-clock comes from the 168k per-rebalance scoring calls (PIT cache amortises across rebalances after the first). minComposite 50 mirrors the sp500 config. The W3 verdict MUST surface the fundamentals + EPS-actual restatement caveat with extra emphasis for russell2k — small-cap restatements are more frequent + material.
